# Scalify Labs

> Scalify Labs is a digital growth infrastructure company based in Ranchi, Jharkhand, India. Founded by Arvind Gupta (15+ years experience), Scalify Labs helps Indian businesses — clinics, institutes, real estate, ecommerce, and local businesses — build connected growth systems combining SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads, CRM automation, WhatsApp marketing, AI workflows, lead nurturing, and analytics.

Scalify Labs is NOT a traditional digital marketing agency. It builds connected growth infrastructure where marketing, lead generation, CRM, automation, and analytics operate as one system.

## Company Information

- **Name**: Scalify Labs
- **Founder**: Arvind Gupta
- **Founded**: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India
- **Tagline**: Building Growth Systems That Scale
- **Website**: https://scalifylabs.com
- **Phone**: +91 87884 24727
- **Email**: hello@scalifylabs.com
- **Address**: Lane No 5, Kamlesh Dubey Chowk, Pirra, Ratu, Ranchi 835222, Jharkhand, India
- **Service Area**: Pan India (primarily Ranchi, Jharkhand, Bihar, Chhattisgarh, UP)

## Core Positioning

Scalify Labs connects:
- Traffic generation (SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads)
- Lead capture (landing pages, website forms, WhatsApp)
- CRM integration (Kylas, Zoho, TeleCRM, Bitrix24, HubSpot)
- Automation (WhatsApp sequences, email nurturing, follow-up workflows)
- Analytics & revenue tracking

This is described as the "Lead to Revenue System" — a monthly managed growth retainer at ₹75,000/month.

## Services Offered

### Advertising & Paid Media
- **Google Ads Services** (Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping) — /services/google-ads-services
- **Meta Ads** (Facebook & Instagram performance ads) — /services/meta-ads
- **Specialized Advertising** (LinkedIn, Quora, Truecaller, Taboola, native ads) — /services/specialized-ads
- **Email Marketing** (Bulk outreach, SMTP, Apollo, cold email, nurture funnels) — /services/email-marketing

### Organic Growth & SEO
- **SEO Services** (Technical SEO, content, link building) — /services/affordable-seo-services
- **Local SEO & GMB** (Google Maps, Google Business Profile) — /services/gmb
- **Website Development** (WordPress, Next.js, conversion-focused) — /services/website-development

### Communication & Automation
- **WhatsApp Marketing** (Business API, broadcast, automation) — /services/whatsapp-marketing-agency
- **RCS Messaging** (Rich Communication Services) — /services/rcs-messaging
- **OBD Voice Calls** (Automated outbound bulk calling) — /services/obd
- **AI Calling & Agents** (AI voice agents for lead follow-up) — /services/ai-calling

### CRM & Revenue Systems
- **Lead Management** (CRM setup: Kylas, TeleCRM, Zoho, HubSpot — one-time ₹40,000–₹60,000) — /services/lead-management
- **Lead to Revenue System** (Full growth infrastructure — ₹75,000/month retainer) — /services/lead-to-revenue

## Super 30 Program

A 45-day offline growth accelerator in Ranchi for aspiring digital marketers. Covers: Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO, AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini), CRM systems, WhatsApp automation, analytics, and business growth thinking. Selection-based, 30 seats per batch, laptop mandatory.

URL: https://scalifylabs.com/super-30

## Founder Profile

**Arvind Gupta** — Founder & Growth Strategist, Scalify Labs
- 15+ years in digital marketing, EdTech, CRM systems, automation, and performance marketing
- Built mentor ecosystem at Dheya (nationwide career guidance platform)
- Expert in: connected growth systems, CRM automation, AI-powered marketing, full-funnel strategy
- Based in Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

## Industries Served

- Clinics & Healthcare (patient lead generation, CRM)
- Education & Coaching Institutes (admission funnels, WhatsApp automation)
- Real Estate (project leads, CRM pipelines)
- Local Businesses (local SEO, Google Ads, WhatsApp)
- Ecommerce & Retail (performance campaigns, retention)
- Service Businesses (lead generation, automation)

## Key Differentiators

1. Connected systems thinking (not isolated services)
2. CRM + automation expertise
3. AI-enabled workflows
4. Full-funnel understanding (traffic → lead → sale → retention)
5. Multi-channel execution (ads + SEO + WhatsApp + CRM in one system)
6. Based in Jharkhand — deep understanding of Tier-2/3 Indian market

## Clients & Case Studies

Past clients include: GC Ceramics, Dheya, Brands Outlet, City Health Guide, Lakshyarth, Career Bloom, Sri Sidhi Vinayak & Co, SD Plaso Fab
